@graph.name: Camera Courses For Beginners - Week 1 of 3 - Coventry 1-7
@graph.description: 01/07/2026Coventry - 3-week camera courses for beginners - Everything to get off Automatic mode and learn how to be more creative with Composition and Camera
@graph.keywords: camera-settings, composition, exposure, photo-critiques, dslr-settings, Week-1, beginner photography, photography for beginners, beginners-courses, Coventry

review.reviewBody: Beginners photography class: I’ve had a DSLR for years and I’ve learnt so much more about it and what it can do in the 3 sessions. Alan knows his stuff!

Beginners camera course, 3 x 2 hour session over three weeks to master the basics of photography. I was one of 3 participants, nice small group. Alan was very patient, as we all have very different camera to work through setting. Have a much better understanding on my camera and critical setting ...
Beginners Camera Class Good informative sessions at a good pace to enable learning and understanding. Now starting to understand the basics of how my camera works and how to set it up. Enjoyed it

I am in New Orleans USA and needed a location shoot in Coventry. I emailed several photographers and Alan was the only one that  promptly replied back and discussed the job with me. He not only worked within my budget but gave me quality deliverables, exactly as I needed. Would definitely work wi...

Beginners photography Course- Alan was wonderful! He gave us incredible tips and insights and explained things in a way that made them make sense. I would definitely recommend this course for anyone wanting to either refresh their basic knowledge is or for complete beginners!

@graph.name: Lightroom Classic Photo Editing Classes -Week 1 of 3 - 7-9
@graph.description: 07/09/2026Coventry - Lightroom photo editing classes - Learn how to use Lightroom Classic on this 3-week course. From the organisation and workflow to editing
@graph.keywords: collections, composition, exporting, exposure, lightroom, photo-critiques, photo-editing, photoshop, Week-1, Lightroom, photo editing, beginners-lightroom, Coventry

review.reviewBody: An insightful session on Lightroom course. Will be implementing this into our teaching practice.

I finally got my longstanding issues resolved.  I should have consulted Alan a long time ago considering all the time I spent trying to fix things myself.  I had thousands of missing photographs in the Lightroom Classic catalog.  This is fixed now.  Also enjoyed working with Alan.  We got on fine...

I was thrilled to find this site and organise a Zoom meeting with Alan. He understood the lightroom problem, helped me sort it out,. Didn't rush and it was so easy to follow what I had to do. Problem sorted and I can now get on and enjoy the programme. I would definitely use Alan again.

Only one paid for session so far, but Alan was thoughtful, helpful and professional.  He listened carefully to what I needed and made sure I got it,  The free 20 min session beforehand ensured I am using his skills appropriately - it was very helpful.  UPDATE: since then I got in a muddle with fi...

Excellent zoom class. Very professional and packed with knowledge. I have learned a lot during this session, got inspired and would recommend to  anyone who wants to improve at fast pace. Thank you Alan.

review.reviewBody: Beginners photography class: I’ve had a DSLR for years and I’ve learnt so much more about it and what it can do in the 3 sessions. Alan knows his stuff!

Beginners camera course, 3 x 2 hour session over three weeks to master the basics of photography. I was one of 3 participants, nice small group. Alan was very patient, as we all have very different camera to work through setting. Have a much better understanding on my camera and critical setting ...
Beginners Camera Class Good informative sessions at a good pace to enable learning and understanding. Now starting to understand the basics of how my camera works and how to set it up. Enjoyed it

I am in New Orleans USA and needed a location shoot in Coventry. I emailed several photographers and Alan was the only one that  promptly replied back and discussed the job with me. He not only worked within my budget but gave me quality deliverables, exactly as I needed. Would definitely work wi...

Beginners photography Course- Alan was wonderful! He gave us incredible tips and insights and explained things in a way that made them make sense. I would definitely recommend this course for anyone wanting to either refresh their basic knowledge is or for complete beginners!

@graph.name: Lightroom Classic Photo Editing Classes - Week 1 of 3 -12-11
@graph.description: 12/11/2026Coventry - Lightroom photo editing classes - Learn how to use Lightroom Classic on this 3-week course. From the organisation and workflow to editing
@graph.keywords: collections, composition, exporting, exposure, lightroom, photo-critiques, photo-editing, photoshop, Week-1, Lightroom, photo editing, beginners-lightroom, Coventry

review.reviewBody: An insightful session on Lightroom course. Will be implementing this into our teaching practice.

I finally got my longstanding issues resolved.  I should have consulted Alan a long time ago considering all the time I spent trying to fix things myself.  I had thousands of missing photographs in the Lightroom Classic catalog.  This is fixed now.  Also enjoyed working with Alan.  We got on fine...

I was thrilled to find this site and organise a Zoom meeting with Alan. He understood the lightroom problem, helped me sort it out,. Didn't rush and it was so easy to follow what I had to do. Problem sorted and I can now get on and enjoy the programme. I would definitely use Alan again.

Only one paid for session so far, but Alan was thoughtful, helpful and professional.  He listened carefully to what I needed and made sure I got it,  The free 20 min session beforehand ensured I am using his skills appropriately - it was very helpful.  UPDATE: since then I got in a muddle with fi...

Excellent zoom class. Very professional and packed with knowledge. I have learned a lot during this session, got inspired and would recommend to  anyone who wants to improve at fast pace. Thank you Alan.

I had thousands of missing photographs in the Lightroom Classic catalog.  This is fixed now.  Also enjoyed working with Alan.  We got on fine...

I was thrilled to find this site and organise a Zoom meeting with Alan. He understood the lightroom problem, helped me sort it out,. Didn't rush and it was so easy to follow what I had to do. Problem sorted and I can now get on and enjoy the programme. I would definitely use Alan again.

Only one paid for session so far, but Alan was thoughtful, helpful and professional.  He listened carefully to what I needed and made sure I got it,  The free 20 min session beforehand ensured I am using his skills appropriately - it was very helpful.  UPDATE: since then I got in a muddle with fi...

Excellent zoom class. Very professional and packed with knowledge. I have learned a lot during this session, got inspired and would recommend to  anyone who wants to improve at fast pace. Thank you Alan.
